figures.caption: Figure 6: Relevancy map overlays for the 30 seconds of a Goal class using Chefer explainability on SoccerMaster

Figure 2: State-of-the-art soccer VLMs such as MatchVision [23] and SoccerMaster [32] attend to irrelevant regions when detecting a “throw-in” event rather than focusing on the actual player that is performing the action. For the “Foul with no card” class, the models failed to identify the offending and injured players and the referee.
